name: Pumpkin Spice Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a skillet to 375°F (190°C). Grease lightly with oil.
2. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients; stir just until all ingredients are moistened.
3. For each pancake, pour 1/4 cup batter into the hot skillet.
4. Cook for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes, turning when edges look cooked and bubbles begin to break on the surface.
5. Continue cooking another minute or until golden brown.
6. Serve with syrup.
